title: Well-done: Mutex ordering documentation in lichen_l2_enable
description: lichen_l2.c:355-372 explicitly documents mutex lock order (tx_mutex first, then rx_mutex) with a rationale comment. This is critical for deadlock avoidance in code that acquires multiple locks. The comment 'Lock order: tx_mutex first to avoid deadlock (consistent ordering)' is precisely the information a future maintainer needs. Keep this comment even if code around it changes.
